prompts.request: Show me all active elements sorted by statistical significance
prompts.expected_response: A filtered table containing only active CRE elements, sorted by FDR ascending so the most statistically significant elements appear first.

prompts.request: Filter my results table to only show inactive elements
prompts.expected_response: A table containing only elements that did not meet the activity threshold, useful for identifying background elements.

prompts.request: Search for elements whose IDs contain 'ENSR' and sort them by FDR
prompts.expected_response: A filtered table of elements whose IDs contain 'ENSR', sorted by FDR so the most significant ENCODE regulatory elements appear first.

prompts.request: Export my library QC results as an HTML report
prompts.expected_response: A self-contained HTML file saved to qc_report.html showing an overall pass/fail banner and detailed results for all 8 library QC checks.

prompts.request: Did my library pass QC? Give me a shareable HTML summary
prompts.expected_response: An HTML report indicating overall pass or fail status across all 8 QC checks, with collapsible per-check detail sections that can be shared with collaborators.

prompts.request: Generate a QC report HTML string without writing it to disk
prompts.expected_response: A self-contained HTML document string starting with <!DOCTYPE html> containing the full QC report, without writing any file to disk.
